Speaker's first-person count of her mother Clara Luper's total arrests. Multiple secondary sources (Behold the Walls memoir, OKC Black Chronicle archives, Encyclopedia of Oklahoma History) cite the 26-arrest figure for Clara Luper during the 1958-66 OKC sit-in campaigns. The claim cross-validates against the corpus canonical record. Net-new fact-check catch.

pending_context.notes: Speaker's first-person account of Clara Luper's father's death/illness story — a canonical episode that recurs in Clara Luper's own memoir Behold the Walls.
